description: Style NoteMulti purpose bags with oodles of style and tons of detailing mark baggit out - and they also succeed in keeping the designs understated and charming. Easily to pair up with whatever you're wearing to complement any outfit. Go ahead and grab your favourite from Baggit's classy range of bags. Product DetailsPurple bagHas one handleHas large eyelets around the bag near the mouth with a ribbon running through which can be drawn to close the compartmentOne main compartment with two internal zippered compartmentsOne zippered compartment at the backComes with a torch attached to a loop inside the bag,  batteries not includedMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean damp cloth when neededSizeHeight: 39 cmWidth: 35 cmDepth: 15 cm
